option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: #!/bin/bash # Build all four backend services (skip tests). # Working directory is the project root. set -e for svc in dalogin-quarkus mbook-quarkus mbooks-quarkus simple-service-webapp-quarkus; do echo "=== Packaging ${svc} ===" (cd "${svc}" && ./mvnw -s ../k8infra/settings-local.xml package -DskipTests) done echo "=== All services packaged ==="
